meaning: adj.愉快的,美妙的,悦耳的,<古> 美味的,有香味的
examples: "Why, Alex, I'm just going put the pretty flowers you brought me in a vase," she said in dulcet tones.
The dulcet sound of the stream ravishes me.
Let him have his first time, that is amazing and dulcet.
Completely advertisement-free, and requiring no registration or subscription, Nokia Music lets consumers immerse themselves in the dulcet tones of their favorite artists without being disrupted.
But the visuals accompanying that dulcet voice are somewhat less reassuring.
